beIN SPORTS 1.title: Arsenal vs Everton - English Premier League

Only Bruno Fernandes  and Dominik Szoboszlai  have created more chances than Arsenal’s Declan Rice in the Premier League this season.

beIN SPORTS 1.title: West Ham United vs Manchester City - English Premier League
beIN SPORTS 1.desc: West Ham United are winless in 20 Premier League matches against Manchester City, since a 2-1 win in September 2015. Only against Fulham  and Newcastle  have they had a longer unbeaten run in their league history.

beIN SPORTS 1.original_title: Real Madrid vs Manchester City - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 1st leg
beIN SPORTS 1.title: Real Madrid vs Manchester City - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 1st leg
beIN SPORTS 1.desc: Manchester City will face Real Madrid for the 16th time in the UEFA Champions League, twice as often as they have faced any other team in the competition. This will be the first time two teams have met in the knockout phase of the competition in five consecutive seasons. Only Bayern Munich  and Juventus  have won more UEFA Champions League games against Real Madrid than Manchester City, who beat them 2-1 in this season's league phase.

beIN SPORTS 1.original_title: Newcastle United vs Barcelona - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 1st leg
beIN SPORTS 1.title: Newcastle United vs Barcelona - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 1st leg
beIN SPORTS 1.desc: Newcastle United have faced Barcelona five times before in Europe, each coming in the UEFA Champions League. The Magpies’ only victory came in the first clash, 3-2 at home in the Group Stages in September 1997, with Barca winning each of the following four games. Barcelona have faced English opposition 33 times in the knockout stages of the UEFA Champions League, winning 10 of their last 12 matches since 2014.

beIN SPORTS 9.desc: H.H. the Father Amir’s Prix 2026 returns on 9–10 January 2026, bringing together top-class Thoroughbred racing across two days of competitive action, featuring a strong international line-up, high-stakes contests, and a standout atmosphere that celebrates elite sport, tradition, and prestige on Qatar’s racing calendar.

beIN SPORTS 9.title: Day 1 - Two Phases – 1.40m - CHI AL SHAQAB Presented by Longines 2026
beIN SPORTS 9.desc: CHI AL SHAQAB presented by Longines 2026, taking place from 18 to 22 February 2026, features world-class equestrian competition at the Al Shaqab venue in Doha. beIN 4K.original_title: Tottenham Hotspur vs. Crystal Palace - English Premier League 2026/2027
beIN 4K.title: Tottenham Hotspur vs. Crystal Palace - English Premier League 2026/2027
beIN 4K.desc: Tottenham Hotspur have won 16 of their last 21 Premier League matches against Crystal Palace, although they have lost two of their last three against the Eagles. After nine consecutive away league defeats at Tottenham Hotspur between 2015-16 and 2023-24, Crystal Palace won this exact fixture 2-0 last season. They have never won consecutive away league games against Spurs.

beIN 4K.original_title: Wolverhampton Wanderers vs. Liverpool - English Premier League 2026/2027
beIN 4K.title: Wolverhampton Wanderers vs. Liverpool - English Premier League 2026/2027
beIN 4K.desc: Wolves have lost 17 of their last 18 Premier League matches against Liverpool, winning the other 3-0 in February 2023 at Molineux under Julen Lopetegui. Liverpool have won 83% of their Premier League games against Wolves, winning 19 of 23 games  – that is the best win ratio of any side to face another 20+ times in the competition’s history.

beIN 4K.original_title: Newcastle United vs. Manchester United - English Premier League 2026/2027
beIN 4K.title: Newcastle United vs. Manchester United - English Premier League 2026/2027
beIN 4K.desc: Newcastle United have won their last three home Premier League matches against Manchester United, as many as in their previous 18 combined. The Magpies last had a longer home league winning run against the Red Devils between 1915 and 1931. Man Utd are looking to record a Premier League double over Newcastle for the first time since the 2020-21 campaign; they won 1-0 on Boxing Day thanks to a goal from Patrick Dorgu.
